research_question: After the direct family substitution test still failed to clear the audit gates, which new atomic price-volume signals from the orthogonal themes of breakout position, volume confirmation, candle-pressure structure, and path efficiency can expand the retained pool with genuinely complementary positive edge under the frozen v18 operational contract?

discovery_contract.builder_rule: each candidate builder may rank exactly one raw signal field and may not combine multiple raw signals inside the same candidate

signal_pool.interpretation: signals trading near the recent 20-day breakout boundary may show cleaner structural continuation than broad momentum alone

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a structural position mechanism centered on recent breakout distance rather than on raw momentum or liquidity trend.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals trading near the recent 60-day breakout boundary may offer a slower and thicker structural trend-position signal

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This tests whether the breakout-position mechanism thickens on a slower structural window.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as a slower-horizon variant of the canonical breakout-proximity mechanism.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals that persistently close near the top of their intraday range may encode a more durable trend-quality signal than simple up-day frequency

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a standardized intraday location mechanism distinct from trend-strength and breakout-position signals.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals with consistently smaller upper-shadow pressure may indicate cleaner continuation and less near-term overhead supply

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a candle-pressure mechanism rather than a rename of breakout or momentum effects.

signal_pool.interpretation: a short-horizon amount surge relative to a 20-day baseline may provide cleaner volume-intensity information than structural liquidity-level signals

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a volume-intensity shock mechanism distinct from structural liquidity trend.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals whose recent traded amount is concentrated on up days may encode stronger price-volume confirmation

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a signed-amount persistence mechanism distinct from raw amount shocks.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals that are simultaneously near breakout and experiencing a recent amount shock may provide a stronger position-plus-confirmation atomic edge

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This explicitly tests whether combining breakout position with volume confirmation creates a new atomic mechanism worth separate budget.
dedup_note.override_reason: Registered as a composite atomic variant because it intentionally fuses the breakout-proximity and amount-shock themes into one predeclared signal.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals that both gap and continue in the same direction may reveal a cleaner short-horizon continuation mechanism than close-to-close reversal variants

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a gap-and-followthrough continuation mechanism rather than a simple reversal direction alias.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals with lower recent downside-tail pressure may offer a more useful downside-quality filter than simple realized-volatility measures

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced an asymmetric downside-pressure mechanism rather than another generic volatility-level test.

signal_pool.interpretation: signals that travel more efficiently over a 20-day path may provide a cleaner trend-quality atomic signal than raw consistency counts

dedup_note.independent_budget_reason: This introduced a path-shape efficiency mechanism distinct from raw trend consistency counts.

discovery_contract.aggregation_rule: none; this round explicitly forbids combining signals
discovery_contract.missing_data_rule: score nulls are allowed and must be preserved for audit; no imputation or cross-signal fallback is allowed

constants_frozen.selection_contract: same calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard, same TopK=10 width, and same v18 top-15 refresh hysteresis
constants_frozen.portfolio_contract: same v18 refreshed-portfolio implementation until any later family round explicitly changes it

promotion_rule.phase_gate: Only atomic signals that show directionally coherent positive edge in signal-edge diagnostics may advance into a later family-construction round.
promotion_rule.non_promotion_rule: A signal that shows negative full-sample IC, inverted decile ordering, or clearly worse head labels than tail labels should be rejected rather than rescued by later extraction or refresh tweaks.

disallowed_changes: Do not mix multiple raw signals into one candidate inside this round.
Do not change the calibrated 0.70 ranking liquidity guard threshold or guard stage.
Do not change the frozen v18 refresh hysteresis rule.
Do not change benchmark or cost contracts.
Do not add extraction, weight-penalty, turnover-suppression, stability-cap, or family-composition changes inside this round.
Do not sweep multiple alternative directions for the same signal beyond the preregistered ten hypotheses in this batch.
Do not introduce PIT quality, value, or investment fields into this round.
Do not return to already rejected raw liquidity-level or low-volatility-level variants in this batch.
notes: This round starts only after the direct substitution family test v21 failed to clear the audit gates even though round 3 had produced one new clean positive keeper.

Round 4 therefore shifts away from horizon-neighbor variants and focuses on more orthogonal atomic price-volume hypotheses drawn from breakout position, volume confirmation, candle-pressure structure, and path efficiency.
The objective is to find one or more genuinely complementary keepers before any later family-construction round is reopened.
